General.Name: Fulu Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Fulu Holdings Limited operates a third-party digital goods and services platform in China. The company operates through five segments: Leisure and Entertainment, Games, Telecommunications, Lifestyle, and Corporate Welfare. Its platform connects digital goods vendors and digital goods sales channels. The company engages in the provision of services to facilitate digital goods transactions, and online stores operating and other services to leisure and entertainment content providers, game producers, telecom providers, and lifestyle service providers. In addition, it operates online stores for digital goods vendors. Further, the company offers employee benefits solutions to corporate clients. Fulu Holdings Limited was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Wuhan, the People's Republic of China.
